warnings: Overall room envelope (2.45m x 2.00m) and the bottom dimension chain (0.80 + 0.10 + 0.40 + 0.70 + 0.45 = 2.45, with a 1.55m sub-bracket over the last three segments) are clearly dimensioned and high confidence. The finer subdivision of which exact wall segment belongs to which named zone, and the left-margin vertical dimension chain (0.10/0.90/2.00/0.90/0.10), were not fully resolved without zooming — flagged low-to-medium confidence.

A box labeled 'เตรียมอาหาร' (food prep) at level +0.60 appears to the right of the WC.1 room in this plan, which is unusual content for a bathroom detail sheet — likely this is an adjacent kitchen/utility area bleeding into the same drawing extent, not a fixture inside the bathroom itself. Not included as a WC.1 element; flagged for human review.
Circled callout markers (triangles with '2' and '3') on the walls reference a finish/material legend that is not printed on this sheet — could not determine what material each callout denotes.

Circled arrow markers '1' and '2' near the top-right, pointing off-sheet toward 'A-10', are cross-references to the interior wall elevations on the next sheet — see บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า12.json (view ① corresponds to arrow 1, view ② corresponds to arrow 2).
See sibling file บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า11_fixture_schedule.json for the fixture symbol legend and mounting-height table also on this page.
